problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: Combining Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
